carFlipperCodes.title: Car Flipper Codes and Redeem Guide
carFlipperCodes.subtitle: Redeem Car Flipper codes for free containers and car parts that help you repair, upgrade, and flip vehicles faster.
carFlipperCodes.intro: Car Flipper codes are entered after the tutorial through the gift icon at the top of the screen. Rewards focus on containers and car parts, which help you restore damaged cars and build your garage early.

activeCodes.reward: 1 Rare Container, 1 Uncommon Container, and 1 Common Container
100 Uncommon Car Parts, 500 Common Car Parts, 1 Rare Container, 1 Uncommon Container, and 1 Common Container

expiredCodes.reward: 1 Rare Container, 1 Uncommon Container, and 1 Common Container

redeemSteps.title: Launch the official Roblox game
redeemSteps.description: Open Car Flipper from the official Roblox experience page instead of script pages, fake mirrors, or unrelated car-flipping results.

redeemSteps.title: Finish the tutorial
redeemSteps.description: The code entry option appears after the early tutorial flow, so complete the starter steps first.

redeemSteps.title: Use the gift icon
redeemSteps.description: Click or tap the gift icon at the top of the screen, enter the code in the code box, and press Enter to claim the reward.

rewardTypes.title: Containers
rewardTypes.description: Containers provide useful garage rewards and help new players build momentum without waiting as long for early resources.

rewardTypes.title: Car Parts
rewardTypes.description: Car parts support the core repair and upgrade loop, especially when restoring damaged vehicles for collection or resale.

carFlipperOfficialLinks.title: Car Flipper Official Links and Game Info
carFlipperOfficialLinks.subtitle: Use the official Roblox page and A&B Group channels to play the right experience and follow real updates.
carFlipperOfficialLinks.intro: Car Flipper is a Roblox vehicle simulation game by A&B Group. The current Roblox title is Car Flipper [TUNING SHOP], and the main loop is about buying damaged cars, repairing them, customizing them, upgrading performance, then keeping or selling them for profit.

info.title: Game Title
info.label: Car Flipper [TUNING SHOP]
info.description: The Roblox listing uses the Tuning Shop title tag, making it the best match when searching for the latest version.

info.title: Core Gameplay
info.label: Repair, customize, upgrade, sell
info.description: Start with broken-down vehicles, buy damaged cars, repair them, customize them, and decide whether to keep or sell them for profit.

info.title: Vehicle Collection
info.label: 100+ unique vehicles

info.title: Progression Goals
info.label: Garage to car empire
info.description: Players can expand their workshop, personalize cars, explore a large world, and race friends.

info.title: Safety Check
info.label: Open the right game
info.description: Use the official Roblox page when searching, because Car Flipper can be mixed up with real-world car-flipping guides and unrelated vehicle games.

carFlipperBeginnerGuide.title: Car Flipper Beginner Guide
carFlipperBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic path from your first rusty wreck to a profitable vehicle flip.
carFlipperBeginnerGuide.intro: Car Flipper is built around a simple garage loop: start with a broken vehicle, repair it, customize it, improve it, then choose between collection value and resale profit. New players should focus on learning this loop before chasing rare vehicles or expensive upgrades.

steps.title: Start with a broken-down vehicle
steps.description: Begin your run by working on a damaged car. This teaches the repair loop before you spend heavily on new vehicles.

steps.title: Buy damaged cars
steps.description: Look for damaged vehicles that can be restored and improved. The game centers on turning rusty wrecks into better cars.
steps.playerGoal: Get cars that can become profitable flips.

steps.title: Repair the car first
steps.description: Repair work should come before style upgrades, because the vehicle needs to become functional before it can become valuable.
steps.playerGoal: Move the car from wreck to usable vehicle.

steps.title: Customize the vehicle
steps.description: Use the customization options to shape the car's look and make each build feel different.
steps.playerGoal: Create a car that matches your garage style.

steps.title: Install upgrades and performance parts
steps.description: Upgrade performance after the repair phase so the car improves beyond its starting condition.
steps.playerGoal: Turn a basic restored car into a stronger build.

steps.title: Decide whether to keep or sell
steps.description: After restoration and customization, choose whether the car belongs in your collection or should be sold for profit.

steps.title: Expand your workshop
steps.description: Use your earnings and resources to grow the workshop and handle better vehicles over time.
steps.playerGoal: Build from a small garage into a larger car business.

steps.title: Explore and race friends
steps.description: Beyond the garage, the game includes a large world to explore and racing with friends as part of the vehicle-focused loop.
steps.playerGoal: Use your finished cars outside the workshop.

carFlipperTuningShop.title: Car Flipper Tuning Shop Guide
carFlipperTuningShop.subtitle: Use the Tuning Shop as the upgrade layer after repairs, customization, and basic garage progress.
carFlipperTuningShop.intro: The Tuning Shop update sits naturally inside Car Flipper's restore-and-upgrade loop. Once a car is repaired, tuning and performance parts help turn it from a simple restored vehicle into a more personal, higher-impact build.

items.title: What the Tuning Shop means
items.content: The current Roblox title is Car Flipper [TUNING SHOP], and the game description highlights upgrading vehicles, installing performance parts, and creating cars that match your style.

items.title: Where tuning fits in the loop
items.content: Tuning works best after the car has been repaired. First restore the damaged vehicle, then use customization and performance upgrades to improve the final build.

items.title: Performance upgrade focus
items.content: The game highlights performance upgrades as a core feature, so tuning is the bridge between a basic restored car and a stronger finished vehicle.

items.title: Style customization focus
items.content: Car Flipper also emphasizes personalization, so tuning is not only about speed or performance. Players can shape cars around their preferred look and garage identity.

items.title: Keep or sell decision
items.content: After tuning, decide whether the upgraded car is worth keeping in your collection or selling for profit. This decision is part of the main Car Flipper loop.

items.title: Workshop progression
items.content: As your workshop grows, tuning becomes more useful because better cars and more customization options give each build more room to improve.

items.title: Best early tuning habit
items.content: Do not spend every resource immediately. Repair the car, check the upgrade options, then tune the parts that support your current goal: resale profit, collection value, or racing with friends.

items.title: Tuning Shop checklist
items.content: Before finishing a car, check repair condition, customization choices, performance parts, upgrade value, and whether the car should be sold or kept.

carFlipperTierList.title: Car Flipper Best Cars and Vehicle Tier List
carFlipperTierList.subtitle: Sort the 100+ unique vehicles by how you want to use them: profit flipping, collecting, customization, or racing.
carFlipperTierList.intro: Car Flipper is built around buying damaged cars, repairing them, customizing them, and then choosing whether to keep them or sell them for profit. Since the game offers 100+ unique vehicles and hundreds of customization options, the most useful tier list is based on vehicle purpose: resale value, long-term collection, tuning potential, and racing use.

tiers.label: Dream Collection Cars
tiers.vehicleScope: Finished vehicles you want to keep after repair, customization, and performance upgrades
tiers.playerAction: Keep the car, personalize it heavily, install performance parts, and use it beyond the garage.

tiers.label: Profit Flip Cars
tiers.vehicleScope: Damaged vehicles that can be repaired, customized, and sold as part of the core flip loop
tiers.playerAction: Buy damaged cars, restore them, improve presentation, and sell them when the profit goal is met.

tiers.label: Upgrade Test Cars
tiers.vehicleScope: Cars used to compare performance parts, customization styles, and driving feel
tiers.playerAction: Use these cars to understand how upgrades, parts, and personalization affect the finished vehicle.

tiers.label: Starter Repair Cars
tiers.vehicleScope: Early broken-down vehicles used to learn the repair-to-sale loop
tiers.playerAction: Focus on restoring, customizing, and selling before spending too much on long-term upgrades.

tiers.label: Showcase Builds
tiers.vehicleScope: Any vehicle chosen mainly for its visual identity and customization potential
tiers.playerAction: Use hundreds of customization options to create cars that match your style.

carFlipperUpgrades.title: Car Flipper Parts and Performance Upgrades
carFlipperUpgrades.subtitle: Understand how repairs, customization, and performance parts fit into the flipping loop before you sell, collect, or race a car.
carFlipperUpgrades.intro: Car Flipper lets players restore damaged vehicles, customize them, install performance parts, and personalize cars before deciding whether to sell or keep them. The upgrade path works best when each car has a clear purpose: quick resale, collection display, or upgraded driving.

rows.role: Turns a broken-down vehicle into a usable project car
rows.impact: Repair is the foundation of the buy-damaged, fix, and sell-for-profit loop.
rows.recommendedPriority: Start here before spending on style or performance.

rows.role: Changes how a car looks and feels as a finished build
rows.bestUsedFor: Collection cars, resale presentation, and personal builds
rows.impact: Customization helps every car become a more complete finished vehicle.
rows.recommendedPriority: Use after core repair work is complete.

rows.role: Improves the upgraded driving side of a vehicle
rows.bestUsedFor: Cars you plan to keep, race, or drive around the world
rows.impact: Performance upgrades connect the workshop loop with racing and exploration.
rows.recommendedPriority: Prioritize on long-term cars instead of every quick resale car.

rows.role: Makes cars match your preferred style
rows.bestUsedFor: Dream vehicles, collection builds, and showcase cars
rows.impact: Personalization turns repaired vehicles into signature builds instead of generic flips.
rows.recommendedPriority: Best for cars you are keeping.

rows.role: Prepares vehicles for use beyond simple selling
rows.bestUsedFor: Racing friends and exploring the massive world
rows.impact: Upgraded cars become useful for the social and driving parts of the game.
rows.recommendedPriority: Use when a car has a driving purpose, not only a resale purpose.

carFlipperWorkshop.title: Car Flipper Workshop Expansion and Profit Guide
carFlipperWorkshop.subtitle: Grow from repairing broken-down cars to building a full car empire through smarter sell, keep, and upgrade decisions.
carFlipperWorkshop.intro: The main progression loop in Car Flipper starts with damaged vehicles and grows into a workshop-centered car business. Buy cars, repair them, customize them, sell for profit, keep favorites in your collection, and expand your workshop as your garage becomes more ambitious.

cards.title: Start With Damaged Cars
cards.description: Buy broken-down vehicles and treat them as restoration projects.
cards.bestDecision: Choose cars you can finish quickly before investing deeply in collection builds.

cards.title: Repair Before You Customize
cards.description: Restoration is the first step before style, parts, or resale planning.
cards.goal: Turn the car from a wreck into a finished vehicle.
cards.bestDecision: Complete the basic repair path before adding extra upgrades.

cards.title: Customize for Better Finished Builds
cards.description: Use customization to make each repaired vehicle feel complete.
cards.goal: Create cars that can become bestsellers or personal collection pieces.
cards.bestDecision: Spend more customization effort on cars with a clear sell or keep purpose.

cards.title: Sell for Profit
cards.description: Finished cars can be sold as part of the core flipping path.
cards.goal: Use successful flips to fund workshop growth and future cars.
cards.bestDecision: Sell cars that are mainly built for profit instead of long-term keepers.

cards.title: Keep Collection Cars
cards.description: Some vehicles are worth keeping as dream cars, showcase builds, or racing cars.
cards.goal: Build a personal vehicle collection, not just a resale business.
cards.bestDecision: Keep cars that you want to drive, personalize, or race with friends.

cards.title: Expand Your Workshop
cards.description: Workshop expansion supports the bigger goal of building a car empire from scratch.
cards.goal: Move from single repairs to a stronger long-term garage operation.
cards.bestDecision: Use profit from sold cars to support broader workshop progression.

carFlipperRacing.title: Car Flipper Racing and World Exploration Guide
carFlipperRacing.subtitle: Use upgraded cars outside the workshop by racing friends, exploring the massive world, and driving your favorite builds.
carFlipperRacing.intro: Car Flipper is not only about buying wrecks and selling finished cars. Upgraded vehicles can also support racing, exploration, collection goals, and social play, giving your best builds a purpose after they leave the repair bay.

items.question: What can you do after repairing a car in Car Flipper?
items.answer: After repairing a damaged vehicle, you can customize it, upgrade it, keep it in your collection, sell it for profit, or use it as a driving-focused build.

items.question: How do performance upgrades connect to racing in Car Flipper?
items.answer: Performance parts are most useful on cars you plan to keep, race with friends, or drive around the world instead of selling immediately.

items.question: Why explore the Car Flipper world instead of only selling cars?
items.answer: Exploration gives upgraded and personalized cars a second purpose beyond resale. A car can become a vehicle you actually drive, show, and use.

items.question: Which Car Flipper cars should be used for racing friends?
items.answer: Use cars that have been repaired, upgraded for performance, and customized around your preferred driving style.

items.question: When should you keep a car instead of selling it in Car Flipper?
items.answer: Keep cars that support your collection, dream vehicle goal, racing plans, or personal style. Sell cars that mainly exist to create profit for workshop growth.

items.question: How does racing fit into the Car Flipper loop?
items.answer: Racing gives upgraded cars value beyond the garage. The loop becomes buy, repair, customize, upgrade, then either sell for profit or drive the finished build.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Car Flipper

questions.question: What is Car Flipper on Roblox?
questions.answer: Car Flipper is a Roblox vehicle simulation game by A&B Group, currently listed as Car Flipper [TUNING SHOP]. The core loop is buying damaged cars, repairing them, customizing them, upgrading performance, then keeping or selling them for profit.

questions.question: How do I redeem Car Flipper codes?
questions.answer: Finish the tutorial, open the gift icon at the top of the screen, enter the code, and press Enter. Car Flipper codes mostly reward containers and car parts that speed up early garage progress.

questions.question: How many vehicles are in Car Flipper?
questions.answer: The official Roblox page highlights more than 100 unique vehicles and hundreds of customization options in Car Flipper, so there is a wide range of cars to repair, upgrade, collect, and sell.

questions.question: What does the Tuning Shop do in Car Flipper?
questions.answer: The Car Flipper Tuning Shop is the upgrade layer that comes after repairs. Once a car is restored, you can use tuning and performance parts to turn it into a stronger, more personal build before keeping or selling it.

questions.question: Is Car Flipper free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Car Flipper is a free Roblox experience you can open from the official Roblox game page on PC, mobile, and console.

questions.question: Can you race friends in Car Flipper?
questions.answer: Yes. Car Flipper includes racing friends and exploring a large world, so upgraded and customized cars have a purpose beyond the garage and resale loop.
